description: PreToolUse(Bash) gate for git commit invocations. Blocks commits to main/master unless the repo's AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md contains <!-- commit-guard: allow-main -->, and blocks commit messages that don't match the required [TYPE] format. Skips type check for editor-mode commits, --amend, and --squash. Never blocks non-commit commands. Always exits 0 (allow) on parse errors (fail-open). Exits 2 to block. Canonical registration lives in the plugin's top-level hooks.json; this file documents the bundle.
